race.comment: HO ALOHA (9) gets back on top of the ground today, missing by 1.6L at Hawkesbury last start on a soft deck. This shapes as an easier assignment and her run two back in country grade was strong. Can knock over her maiden today despite the tricky barrier. THREE WISHES (10) got well back last start at Muswellbrook when first-up but closed off nicely over 1000m. She'll be better for that effort and things look to work out nicely for her second-up. Expecting a forward showing. TERRA LUMINA (4) is racing well at provincial level and has plenty of upside coming back to country grade today. He'll need a touch of luck in the run, but his recent form stacks up and he's sure to be in the finish. WILD ROMEO (6) showed glimpses in his debut campaign and can return on a positive note. TROFEO (5) won't be far away.
